name: Jamal Alvarez
personality: Jamal is steady‑nerved and practical, always scanning for the next call while keeping his crew’s banter light. He’s proud of his Puerto Rican roots and volunteers at the local community garden on his off‑days.
quirk: He never goes on a shift without his battered, sticker‑covered thermos of black coffee, which he calls his “life juice.”
voice: “Alright, let’s get you steady—no rush, we’ve got this,” he says with a calm, measured cadence.
daily: Starts his day at 5 am, grabs the coffee, checks the ambulance, then spends the next twelve hours racing through Red Hook’s streets responding to emergencies.
